scope.summary: A3a adds a DBMS_FLASHBACK capability preflight before rollback, defensive disable, enable, or caller read, so missing capability returns a typed refusal before session state changes.
out_of_scope: Pinned-session recycle/reconnect behavior owned by A4e.
Workspace-wide gates in the shared dirty checkout.

entry_points.name: A3a preflight unit coverage
entry_points.trace: `timeout 240 env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-db --lib read_query_as_of -- --nocapture` exited 0 at source 707ffbd: 9 passed, including read_query_as_of_refuses_missing_dbms_flashback_before_opening_a_window, which now records only the CURRENT_SCN_SQL capability probe before refusal.

entry_points.name: D4 privilege-matrix fixture
entry_points.trace: `timeout 180 bash scripts/rig/oracle_l1.sh privilege-matrix --log` exited 0 and verified the free23 D4 fixture with ORACLEMCP_D4_CATALOG_OBJECT_ID=126293.

entry_points.name: D4 no-flashback live acceptance
entry_points.trace: `timeout 240 env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target ORACLEMCP_D4_* cargo test -p oraclemcp-db --features live-xe --test privilege_matrix_live -- --nocapture` exited 0 at source 707ffbd: d4_no_flashback_principal_gets_typed_refusal_and_connection_stays_usable and d4_catalog_blind_principal_cannot_prove_the_known_guarded_table_read_only both passed, with 0 ignored.

entry_points.name: DB package formatting and check
entry_points.trace: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo fmt --package oraclemcp-db --check` exited 0, and `timeout 240 env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo check -p oraclemcp-db` exited 0 at source 707ffbd.

limitations: Evidence was produced from the clean temporary worktree because the shared checkout contained other agents' dirty work.
No workspace-wide cargo gate is claimed.
No A4e session-recycle path was changed.
